text: Containment and Damage Control: identify which step is of the highest importance for personal protection?

options.text: Don required PPE as determined from the MSDS.
Fight fire (if any), being careful to use firefighting methods compatible with the material involved.
Shut off or otherwise stem the spill at the source.
Contain liquid material using barriers, such as absorbents, rags or other equipment suitable to dam the flow.

explanation: Personnel safety is the paramount priority in any emergency response. According to the Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS), wearing the appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) is the first step to prevent exposure to hazardous substances before attempting containment.
